---
title: "aisdk.slm"
subtitle: "Local Small Language Model Inference"
---

A self-contained engine for running **local** small language models: quantized
**GGUF** models and **ONNX**/**torch** models on local hardware, plus model
discovery and weight downloading. Designed to plug into the `aisdk` ecosystem
while remaining usable on its own.

- **Status:** development (GitHub)
- **Source:** [github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.slm](https://github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.slm)

## Install

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("YuLab-SMU/aisdk.slm")
```

## Highlights

- Run quantized GGUF models locally.
- ONNX / torch model backends.
- Model discovery and downloading into a local cache.
